steps.name: rough-scene-compatibility-audit
steps.summary: Created experiments/132-physical-rough-terrain-scene/verify/rough-scene-audit.json. Static audit passed for g1-rough-walk, go1-rough-walk, and spot-rough-walk: each canonical registry scene points to the bundled rough MJCF and each rough MJCF has a floor plane plus three named box curb geoms.
